query: Get comprehensive company profile data for the company named "eMazzanti Technologies". The company's official website domain is emazzanti.net — use this for disambiguation and to ensure you are searching for the correct company. Gather information from LinkedIn, G2, Reddit, and other reliable sources. Include company details, reviews, industry codes (UNSPSC, NAICS, ISIC), and market sentiment.
answer:
## Executive Summary
eMazzanti Technologies (legally Mazzanti, Inc.) is a New Jersey-based, woman-owned Managed Services Provider (MSP) specializing in retail IT, cloud computing, and network security. While the company enjoys exceptionally high customer satisfaction and numerous industry accolades—including multiple Microsoft Partner of the Year awards—it faces significant internal challenges, marked by below-market compensation and poor employee sentiment regarding work-life balance. 

## Key Findings

### Company Overview & Operations
Founded in August 2001, just weeks before 9/11, eMazzanti Technologies is headquartered at 701 Grand St, Hoboken, New Jersey, 07030 [Member News: eMazzanti Technologies to Celebrate 17 Years of Customer Success and Growth in Style - Italchamber](https://italchamber.org/member-news-emazzanti-technologies-celebrate-17-years-customer-success-growth-style/), [eMazzanti Technologies Company Profile | Management and Employees List](https://www.datanyze.com/companies/emazzanti-technologies/12779872). The woman-owned business is led by Co-Founder and CEO Jennifer Mazzanti, alongside Co-Founder and President Carl Mazzanti [eMazzanti Technologies - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/emazzanti-technologies), [Jennifer Mazzanti, eMazzanti Technologies - Boost Your Business’s Productivity to a Whole New Level - ValiantCEO](https://valiantceo.com/jennifer-mazzanti-emazzanti-technologies/). 

As of July 1, 2024, the company reported an employee headcount of 46 [eMazzanti - 2026 Company Profile & Competitors - Tracxn](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/emazzanti/__HJtjNkUcmRhvpumZruwSTLUDgAOneBwQYArgRqExXGw). The firm operates globally, servicing clients ranging from home offices to multinational corporations [eMazzanti Technologies | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/emazzanti-technologies). eMazzanti also operates subsidiaries, including Liqui-Site, a digital agency focused on creative and technical execution, and Messaging Architects, which provides eDiscovery technology services [Liqui-Site | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/liquisite), [eMazzanti Technologies Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/emazzanti-technologies/5a1d9bb02300005a008b2ba5).

**Corporate Identifiers:**
*   **SAM.GOV Unique Entity ID (UEI):** ZM75C1KUN1F6 [Network Security | IT Support | IT Services | Hoboken, NJ | eMazzanti](https://www.emazzanti.net/about/)
*   **Cage Code:** 4H3H1 [Network Security | IT Support | IT Services | Hoboken, NJ | eMazzanti](https://www.emazzanti.net/about/)
*   **Dun & Bradstreet (D&B) Number:** 041650149 [Network Security | IT Support | IT Services | Hoboken, NJ | eMazzanti](https://www.emazzanti.net/about/)

### Industry Classifications
eMazzanti Technologies operates primarily in the IT Services, Business Services, and Computer and Network Security sectors [eMazzanti Technologies Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/emazzanti-technologies/5a1d9bb02300005a008b2ba5), [eMazzanti Technologies is on Inc.'s Regionals 2025: Northeast list!](https://www.inc.com/profile/emazzanti-technologies). The company is officially classified under the following codes:
*   **NAICS Codes:** 541512 (Computer Systems Design Services), 5415, 54151, 541, and 54 (Professional, Scientific, and Technical Services) [eMazzanti Technologies Information](https://rocketreach.co/emazzanti-technologies-profile_b5e511f4f42e672d), [eMazzanti Technologies Company Overview, Contact Details & Competitors | LeadIQ](https://leadiq.com/c/emazzanti-technologies/5a1d9bb02300005a008b2ba5), [eMazzanti Technologies - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/emazzanti-technologies-co/12779872).
*   **SIC Codes:** 737 (Computer Programming, Data Processing, and Other Computer Related Services) and 73 (Business Services) [eMazzanti Technologies - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/emazzanti-technologies-co/12779872).

### Service Offerings & Market Position
The company provides a comprehensive suite of IT services, including antivirus solutions, network security, cloud computing, virtualization, PCI compliance, and email security [eMazzanti Technologies | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/emazzanti-technologies). They have notable specializations in:
*   **Retail & POS:** Providing specialized Point of Sale and retail technology solutions [eMazzanti Technologies | LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/emazzanti-technologies).
*   **Artificial Intelligence:** Offering AI advisory services and an AI-powered IT support assistant named 'eBot', built on Microsoft Copilot Studio [eMazzanti - 2026 Company Profile & Competitors - Tracxn](https://tracxn.com/d/companies/emazzanti/__HJtjNkUcmRhvpumZruwSTLUDgAOneBwQYArgRqExXGw).

eMazzanti is highly decorated within the B2B technology space. It is a Microsoft Gold Certified Partner, a Top 200 Microsoft Partner, and a four-time Microsoft Partner of the Year [Jennifer Mazzanti, eMazzanti Technologies - Boost Your Business’s Productivity to a Whole New Level - ValiantCEO](https://valiantceo.com/jennifer-mazzanti-emazzanti-technologies/), [eMazzanti Technologies: 2026 Reviews, Pricing & Services](https://networkassured.com/vendors/emazzanti-technologies/). It has also been named a WatchGuard Partner of the Year five times [eMazzanti Technologies | iManage](https://imanage.com/implementation-partners/emazzanti-technologies/) and an Inc. 5000 honoree for 10 years as of 2024 [eMazzanti Technologies CEO Jennifer Mazzanti Honored As NJBIZ 2024 Leader In Digital Technology](https://www.prweb.com/releases/emazzanti-technologies-ceo-jennifer-mazzanti-honored-as-njbiz-2024-leader-in-digital-technology-302230087.html).

### Customer Sentiment & Reviews
Client feedback is overwhelmingly positive, indicating strong service delivery and measurable ROI, despite premium pricing.
*   **Ratings:** The firm holds a 4.9-star rating across 200 reviews on Birdeye [eMazzanti Technologies - 200 Reviews - Computers in Hoboken, NJ - Birdeye](https://reviews.birdeye.com/emazzanti-technologies-150466027787272). FeaturedCustomers lists 85 customer reviews and 77 case studies praising the firm for exceeding expectations [162 eMazzanti Technologies Customer Reviews & References | FeaturedCustomers](https://www.featuredcustomers.com/vendor/emazzanti-technologies).
*   **Pricing & ROI:** On Clutch, eMazzanti charges an average hourly rate of $100 - $149 with a minimum project size of $1,000+ [eMazzanti Technologies Reviews (9), Pricing, Services & Verified Ratings](https://clutch.co/profile/emazzanti-technologies). Clients report tangible benefits, such as a 45% increase in gift card sales and a 25% increase in repeat business [eMazzanti Technologies Reviews (9), Pricing, Services & Verified Ratings](https://clutch.co/profile/emazzanti-technologies). While clients value the strategic expertise, some noted the services are costlier than competitors [eMazzanti Technologies Reviews (9), Pricing, Services & Verified Ratings](https://clutch.co/profile/emazzanti-technologies).
*   **Rankings:** Clutch ranked eMazzanti #1 out of 133 Top NYC Managed IT Service Providers in February 2019 [Working at eMazzanti Technologies | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-eMazzanti-Technologies-EI_IE776419.11,33.htm). In 2026, Clutch ranked them #2 for Top IT Consultants for Retail Companies in NYC (January) and #7 for Top IT Consultants for Nonprofits in the US (May) [Top IT Consultants for Retail Companies in New York City - Jan 2026 Rankings | Clutch.co](https://clutch.co/it-services/retail-industry/new-york), [Top IT Consultants for Nonprofits in the United States - May 2026 Rankings | Clutch.co](https://clutch.co/us/it-services/nonprofit-industry).

### Employee Sentiment & Workplace Culture
In stark contrast to its client reviews, eMazzanti struggles with employee satisfaction and retention metrics.
*   **Overall Ratings:** On Glassdoor, the company holds a 2.8 out of 5-star rating based on 42-43 reviews, with only 41% of employees willing to recommend the company to a friend [eMazzanti Technologies Reviews (42): Pros & Cons of Working At eMazzanti Technologies | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/eMazzanti-Technologies-Reviews-E776419.htm). Only 45% of surveyed employees have a positive business outlook for the firm [Working at eMazzanti Technologies | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-eMazzanti-Technologies-EI_IE776419.11,33.htm).
*   **Compensation:** Employees rate compensation and benefits at 2.5/5 overall, dropping to 2.1/5 specifically in Hoboken [eMazzanti Technologies Reviews (42): Pros & Cons of Working At eMazzanti Technologies | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/eMazzanti-Technologies-Reviews-E776419.htm), [eMazzanti Technologies Salaries in Hoboken | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Salary/eMazzanti-Technologies-Hoboken-Salaries-EI_IE776419.0,22_IL.23,30_IC1126809.htm). The average Network Engineer salary at the company is estimated at $105,506, which is 24% below the Hoboken market average of $130,734 [Emazzanti Technologies Network Engineer Salaries in Hoboken | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Salary/eMazzanti-Technologies-Network-Engineer-Hoboken-Salaries-EJI_IE776419.0,22_KO23,39_IL.40,47_IC1126809.htm).
*   **Work-Life Balance:** Rated at 2.4/5 on Glassdoor, with one review claiming staff may be required to work 6 days a week during certain periods [eMazzanti Technologies Reviews (42): Pros & Cons of Working At eMazzanti Technologies | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/eMazzanti-Technologies-Reviews-E776419.htm), [eMazzanti Technologies - Bad Choice | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/Employee-Review-eMazzanti-Technologies-E776419-RVW8248028.htm).
*   **Culture & Hiring:** The interview process has a difficulty score of 2.7/5 and includes an unconventional question from the owner asking if candidates have pets, based on a belief that pet owners are harder working and more nurturing [Working at eMazzanti Technologies | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-eMazzanti-Technologies-EI_IE776419.11,33.htm), [eMazzanti Technologies Interview Questions (2025) | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Interview/eMazzanti-Technologies-Interview-Questions-E776419.htm). On the positive side, employees highlight free lunches, an inclusive environment, and an "unlimited training budget" for certifications [Working at eMazzanti Technologies: Employee Reviews about Work-Life Balance | Indeed.com](https://www.indeed.com/cmp/Emazzanti-Technologies/reviews?fcountry=US&ftopic=wlbalance), [eMazzanti Grows Staff 10% in 30 Days with eMazzanti.Ninja Career Site](https://www.emazzanti.net/blogs/articles/emazzanti-ninja-career-site-pr).

## Analysis & Risk Assessment
eMazzanti Technologies presents a highly bifurcated risk profile. Externally, the firm is a premium, high-performing MSP with deep technical competencies in Microsoft ecosystems, retail POS, and emerging AI tools. Their ability to drive measurable revenue increases for clients justifies their higher-than-average hourly rates ($100 - $149). 

Internally, however, the company faces significant human capital risks. The combination of below-market compensation (e.g., a 24% deficit for Network Engineers in Hoboken) and poor work-life balance scores suggests a high risk of employee burnout and turnover. While the company attempts to offset this with perks like unlimited training budgets and free lunches, the core structural issues reflected in their 2.8/5 Glassdoor rating could threaten their long-term ability to maintain the high service standards their premium pricing demands.

## Gaps and Limitations
*   **Missing Industry Codes:** The research findings did not contain the requested UNSPSC or ISIC industry classification codes.
*   **Financial Data:** Exact annual revenue figures and profit margins were not available in the provided data.
*   **Recent Turnover Rates:** While employee sentiment is documented, exact attrition or turnover percentages are not available to quantify the human capital risk.
